description_long: This pedestrian adult is depicted as a male figure with a striking punk-inspired appearance, featuring a fitted jacket adorned with prominent spikes on the shoulders and studded details along the seams. The jacket is decorated with large rose motifs and is paired with tight pants that have a gradient effect, transitioning from dark to lighter tones. He wears heavy-duty boots with thick soles and multiple buckles, adding to the rugged aesthetic. Accessories include a studded belt, fingerless gloves, and a small plush toy or keychain attached to his belt. His face is partially obscured by a mask, and his hair is styled in a dramatic, swept-back fashion, contributing to his rebellious urban look.
description: A punk-styled male pedestrian with a spiked jacket, studded accessories, heavy boots, and a dramatic hairstyle, exuding a rebellious urban vibe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the spiked shoulders, rose motifs, mask, and plush accessory on the belt.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the spiked jacket, plush accessory, and the swept-back hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the jacket with spikes, studded belt, and the full length of the boots.
description_view_3: Right rear angle emphasizes the jacket's structure, belt details, and the plush accessory's placement.
attribute_clothing_type: punk-style spiked jacket, fitted pants, studded belt, fingerless gloves, heavy-duty boots
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length swept-back hair with an undercut
